Symbol Lock Threshold

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xa4
Size:
0x4

Description

Sets the value at which to declace symbol lock

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:16] iq_var_threshold rw 0x7530 Lock Threshold - Costas Q Mean/Variance Metric
[15:0] iq_eng_threshold rw 0xe000 Lock Threshold - Costas IQ Energy Metric

Field Descriptions

iq_var_threshold - Lock Threshold - Costas Q Mean/Variance Metric

Value is represents a variance from mean, in this regard it is an absolute value. Currently the value is determined empirically. Default value is 30000

iq_eng_threshold - Lock Threshold - Costas IQ Energy Metric

Value is UQ0.16 - 0 integer bits and 16 fractional bits 0x8000 = 0.5 0xC000 = 0.75 0xE000 = 0.875 (default)
